stories.title: First Taiwan, then South Korea? How global AI supercycle is demoting Indian stock market
stories.summary: A global AI-led market shift is driving massive foreign capital outflows from India toward East Asia’s technology hubs, with overseas investors pulling nearly $24 billion from Indian equities this year. Fueled by the AI boom and a sharp rally in Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company, Taiwan has overtaken India as the world’s fifth-largest stock market, while South Korea is emerging as another strong challenger.
